3162280.name: Affiliated Homies
3162280.description:
Affiliated Homies is a casual high-stakes multiplayer game where trust is a luxury you can't afford. Set in chaotic environments, players are thrusted into a deadly game of cat and mouse, where the line between friend and foe is blurred!

Two Factions, One Mission

Join the Affiliated, a group of criminals determined to protect their stolen goods, or play as an undercover cop on a mission to recover them.

Intense Multiplayer Action

Engage in fast-paced gameplay with friends or players around the world. Each round brings a fresh wave of tension as you navigate the crowded scenario, trying to identify and eliminate your enemies.

Absurd Recoil Mechanics

Experience the challenge of Affiliated Homies banana recoil system. Every shot counts, but managing your weapon’s kickback will be the worst for players. Mastering your recoil control could be the difference between win and lose.

Close-Quarters Combat

Every encounter is up close and personal, where you'll need quick reflexes to stay alive. Expect no mercy in these tight, claustrophobic spaces, where every corner could be your last.

Hope you enjoy! <3
